_comment: Copy to config/local.json (gitignored). Merged over default.json — see docs/configuration.md and docs/CHANGELOG.md

repos.name: my-test-repo
repos.description: Repo used when Jira issue has label my-test-repo

defaults.acknowledgmentMessage: Thanks — we are reviewing this issue.

_jira_secrets: Prefer env: JIRA_BASE_URL, JIRA_EMAIL, JIRA_API_TOKEN (see docs/configuration.md). Cooldowns: JIRA_AUTO_ANALYSIS_COOLDOWN_MS, JIRA_MISSING_LABELS_REMINDER_COOLDOWN_MS.
_pr_secrets: PR pipeline: prefer env — GITHUB_TOKEN or GH_TOKEN; Bitbucket access token BITBUCKET_TOKEN (or app password: BITBUCKET_USERNAME + BITBUCKET_APP_PASSWORD). File: githubToken, bitbucketToken, bitbucketUsername, bitbucketAppPassword on @agent-detective/pr-pipeline. Env overrides file. See docs/configuration.md (PR pipeline section).
